2026-02-27T01:59:45.5281070Z ##[group]Run # Generate a secure random API key (360 bits of entropy, 40+ chars)
2026-02-27T01:59:45.5281678Z [36;1m# Generate a secure random API key (360 bits of entropy, 40+ chars)[0m
2026-02-27T01:59:45.5282136Z [36;1m# Mask immediately to prevent timing vulnerabilities[0m
2026-02-27T01:59:45.5282512Z [36;1mAPI_KEY=$(openssl rand -base64 45 | tr -d '/+=')[0m
2026-02-27T01:59:45.5282829Z [36;1mecho "::add-mask::${API_KEY}"[0m
2026-02-27T01:59:45.5283061Z [36;1m[0m
2026-02-27T01:59:45.5283225Z [36;1mPORT=3001[0m
2026-02-27T01:59:45.5283406Z [36;1m[0m
2026-02-27T01:59:45.5283572Z [36;1m# Set outputs for next steps[0m
2026-02-27T01:59:45.5283802Z [36;1m{[0m
2026-02-27T01:59:45.5283997Z [36;1m  echo "safe_outputs_api_key=${API_KEY}"[0m
2026-02-27T01:59:45.5284487Z [36;1m  echo "safe_outputs_port=${PORT}"[0m
2026-02-27T01:59:45.5284760Z [36;1m} >> "$GITHUB_OUTPUT"[0m
2026-02-27T01:59:45.5284968Z [36;1m[0m
2026-02-27T01:59:45.5285217Z [36;1mecho "Safe Outputs MCP server will run on port ${PORT}"[0m
